channel.title: GeoPulse. Geopolitics in brief
channel.description: Signal-first briefings on geopolitics, edited by Lavkesh Dwivedi.

item.title: Ukrainian Drone Hits Building In Russian City 1,900 Kms Away From Kyiv
item.description: Ukrainian forces launched a drone attack on a high-rise building in the Russian city of Krasnodar, approximately 1,900 kilometers from Kyiv. Smoke was seen pouring out of the building after the attack.

item.title: Witkoff and Kushner to Travel to Pakistan for Talks on Iran
item.description: Robert Witkoff and Jared Kushner are traveling to Pakistan for talks on Iran. The exact nature and scope of the discussions are not yet clear. Witkoff and Kushner to Travel to Pakistan for Talks on Iran.

item.title: Indonesian UN peacekeeper becomes sixth killed in Lebanon
item.description: An Indonesian soldier has become the sixth UN peacekeeper killed in recent hostilities in southern Lebanon. The incident occurred in the midst of ongoing tensions in the region. Indonesian UN peacekeeper becomes sixth killed in Lebanon.

item.title: Seven dead in major Russian attack on Ukraine
item.description: Seven people died in a Russian attack on Ukraine. Dnipro was hardest hit. Seven dead in major Russian attack on Ukraine.

item.title: In A First, Press-Critic Trump To Attend Media Event On Saturday
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump will attend a media event on Saturday, marking a rare appearance at a press gathering. Some members of the press corps have expressed objections to his participation.

item.title: How sport is helping protect girls in Uganda
item.description: Coach Zuena Cheptoek in eastern Uganda uses her running program to protect girls from female genital mutilation, child marriage, and abuse. Her program provides a safe space for girls to receive mentorship and support.

item.title: Russian strikes kill six across Ukraine
item.description: Russian strikes killed six people across Ukraine. Attacks occurred in multiple locations. Russian strikes kill six across Ukraine Newsbug. info.

item.title: Explosions and gunfire as armed groups launch coordinated attacks across Mali
item.description: Armed groups launched coordinated attacks across Mali. Clashes occurred in the centre and north. Witnesses report clashes in the centre and north of the country in what has been described as the largest jihadist attack in years.

item.title: Zelenskyy ready to hold Ukraine-Russia talks in Azerbaijan
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy is ready to hold talks with Russia in Azerbaijan. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said his country is ready to hold talks with Russia in Azerbaijan. Meanwhile, Russian attacks killed several people across Ukraine.

item.title: Iran Foreign Minister Araghchi meets Pakistan Army chief Munir
item.description: Iran's Foreign Minister Araghchi met with Pakistan's Army chief Munir, coinciding with the resumption of commercial flights from Tehran's international airport after a two-month hiatus. Iran resumes commercial flights from Tehran’s international airport for the first time since the conflict with the U. S.

item.title: US envoys head to Pakistan for Iran war talks
item.description: US envoys are heading to Pakistan for Iran war talks. The US is "looking for a face-saving way to escape the war quagmire it has become trapped in", says Iran's defence ministry.

item.title: Iran resumes commercial flights from Tehran’s international airport for first time since conflict
item.description: Iran resumed commercial flights from Tehran's international airport after a two-month halt due to conflict. Iran has resumed commercial flights from Tehran’s international airport for the first time since the conflict with the U. S.

item.title: 850 Of Elon Musk's Recent X Posts On Discrimination Against White People
item.description: Elon Musk made 850 posts on X about discrimination against white people. Musk's focus on race has also drawn criticism from some of his former supporters. 850 Of Elon Musk's Recent X Posts On Discrimination Against White People.

item.title: Gunmen stage simultaneous attacks across Mali, army says
item.description: Gunmen staged simultaneous attacks across Mali, including the capital Bamako. Capital Bamako and several other locations hit in an apparently coordinated ⁠assault involving multiple groups. Gunmen stage simultaneous attacks across Mali, army says.

item.title: ‘Astonishing’ discovery could help save children from deadly disfiguring condition
item.description: Researchers found a new bacteria in noma patients that could lead to treatments for the disease.

item.title: Top Iranian and Pakistani officials meet in Islamabad
item.description: Iran's FM Abbas Araghchi met Pakistani officials in Islamabad for talks. Iran’s FM Abbas Araghchi is in Islamabad for talks with Pakistani officials, as US envoys are also set to arrive.

item.title: Overnight Russian attacks on Ukraine kill five, injure 30
item.description: Russian attacks on Ukraine killed five people and injured 30 in Dnipro. Russia launched more than 600 drones and 47 missiles as it targeted eight regions in Dnipro, authorities say.

item.title: Israel Has Become a Direct Threat to Global Security - Hasht-e Subh Daily
item.description: Iran's Fidan said Israel is a direct threat to global security. Fidan: Israel Has Become a Direct Threat to Global Security Hasht-e Subh Daily. Israel Has Become a Direct Threat to Global Security - Hasht-e Subh Daily.

item.title: On Iran’s Border, Cooking Oil Trade Is a Snapshot of the Country’s Struggles
item.description: Iran's economic crisis has forced many to cross into Turkey to buy basic goods like cooking oil. The war has exacerbated Iran’s economic crisis, forcing many to cross the border into Turkey to buy the most basic goods.

item.title: 'Panda bond' continues as China sends giant pandas to US zoo
item.description: China sent two giant pandas to a US zoo in Atlanta as part of a 10-year deal. Two giant pandas from China are headed to Atlanta on a new 10-year conservation deal.
